revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Country data Samoa
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Samoa|Western Samoa}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Western Samoa}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Country data Samoa
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Samoa|Western Samoa}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Western Samoa}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Country data Samoa
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Samoa|Western Samoa}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Western Samoa}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Country data Samoa
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Samoa|Western Samoa}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Western Samoa}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Western_Samoa here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Western_Samoa for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{Country data Samoa
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Samoa|Western Samoa}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Western Samoa}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
